research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
black_zone_example: Access/insurance/payment and community-care pathways affect whether testing begins.
what_got_lost: High-risk history and persistent symptoms never enter a stable diagnostic pathway.
design_affordance: Community intake + access-risk flags + incomplete-workup registry.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
black_zone_example: Key context such as family history, recent discharge, or repeat visit may not be visible.
what_got_lost: A return visit can look like a new isolated encounter.
design_affordance: Front-door repeat-visit banner and family-history prompt.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
black_zone_example: Abnormal vitals exist but are not integrated into diagnosis.
what_got_lost: Tachycardia, tachypnea, oxygen saturation, neuro deficits lose salience.
design_affordance: Triage risk model with forced reassessment when vitals worsen or repeat visits occur.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
black_zone_example: First plausible diagnosis closes the case.
design_affordance: Diagnostic time-out: 'what would be dangerous to miss?' with condition-specific prompts.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
black_zone_example: Family history, medication access, and symptom timeline are not integrated.
what_got_lost: Cost-related medication interruption or autoimmune/cancer family history is treated as background.
design_affordance: Structured risk-context capture linked to decision support.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
black_zone_example: Time-sensitive exams can be absent or delayed.
what_got_lost: Abdominal/testicular signs and evolving pain are not escalated fast enough.
design_affordance: Complaint-linked exam checklist and timer for torsion/appendicitis pathways.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
black_zone_example: Right lab is not ordered, or ordered but not matched to presentation.
what_got_lost: CRP, thyroid tests, antibody results, RDT/microscopy availability.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
black_zone_example: Wrong imaging, no imaging, or limited anatomic scope.
what_got_lost: Thoracic abscess missed by lumbar MRI; no CXR; no CTA/perfusion; delayed ultrasound.
design_affordance: Imaging scope/rule-out warning and emergency pathway trigger.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
black_zone_example: Abnormal result exists but severity/action is not communicated.
what_got_lost: Right-heart strain, Listeria, AChR antibody, echo vegetation, unexpected radiology finding.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
black_zone_example: Pending results and uncertainty disappear from the patient plan.
what_got_lost: Patient leaves before critical information returns or before serial tests are done.
design_affordance: Discharge plan must list pending tests, owner, date, escalation route, and patient-facing meaning.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
black_zone_example: Referral is needed but not made, delayed, wrong, or abandoned after poor interaction.
what_got_lost: Specialty handoff does not happen or patient drops out after negative encounter.
design_affordance: Referral closure tracking plus patient experience/escalation feedback loop.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
black_zone_example: Return visits do not cause diagnostic reset.
what_got_lost: The system repeats the same explanation despite worsening signals.
design_affordance: Repeat-visit diagnostic reset requiring a new differential and review of prior notes/results.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
black_zone_example: Specialist sees one slice, remote note, or wrong chart.
what_got_lost: Wrong patient chart, remote stroke decision, specialty assumptions.
design_affordance: Identity verification, red-flag checklist, and cross-specialty summary pane.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
black_zone_example: Slow trends and chronic invalidation hide deterioration.
what_got_lost: Anemia trend, repeated admissions, persistent symptoms, nutrition decline.
design_affordance: Trend explorer with unresolved-problem list and functional status/quality-of-life metrics.
